description: Style Note Stretchy and comfy room-to-grow style t-shirt from Mr men. Throw in a bit of attitude and this stylish tee is the go-to piece for summertime games and fun, this tee will last longer than his scruffy escapades! Product Details White t-shirt with a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and rubber print on the front Material and Care 100% Cotton Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Do not dry clean
